description: A weighted TileMutatorDef chance entry inside a LandmarkDef mutator list. The containing element name is the TileMutatorDef defName; scalar text is the chance; the Required XML attribute marks mandatory mutators.

mutator.label: Mutator
mutator.description: TileMutatorDef defName. Populated from the XML element name by the keyedObjectList loader.

chance.label: Chance
chance.description: Probability this mutator is applied. Populated from scalar element text; defaults to 1 when the element is self-closing.

required.label: Required
required.description: When true, this mutator must be present on the tile for the landmark to be valid. Stored as the Required XML attribute.
